biography.text:
Tiara Andini or often called 'Titi', was born in Jember, East Java on September 23, 2001. This Indonesian Idol Season X runner-up has won various categories at prestigious awards such as Anugerah Musik Indonesia, Indonesian Music Awards, Mnet Asian Music Awards, and many more. ​

Her golden voice has brought to life a diverse various works that have dominated the Indonesian chart such as "Janji Setia", "Usai", "Merasa Indah"  as well as her collaborative work such as "Lagu Pernikahan Kita" and "Cintanya Aku". Her latest
collaboration song with Yovie Widianto "Tanpa Cinta" has received positive responses not only from Indonesia, but also Malaysia.
